title: Custom-keyword extension point (x-jit-*)
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 5.3, 11.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] A registration point lets jit register x-jit-* custom keywords with the validator.
- [hard] A schema using an x-jit-* keyword still validates structurally under a standard validator (unknown-keyword ignore), demonstrated by a test.
- [aspirational] A sample keyword (optionally CEL-backed) is demonstrated end-to-end.
